sql_query.query: SELECT u.id, u.organization_id AS "organizationId", u.name, u.email, u.role, u.password, (CURRENT_TIMESTAMP + INTERVAL '8 hours')::text AS "expiresAt" FROM users u JOIN organizations o ON o.id = u.organization_id AND o.active = TRUE WHERE LOWER(u.email) = LOWER($1) AND u.active = TRUE AND u.role IN ('learner', 'mentor', 'finance', 'admin') AND (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users u2 JOIN organizations o2 ON o2.id = u2.organization_id AND o2.active = TRUE WHERE LOWER(u2.email) = LOWER($1) AND u2.active = TRUE) = 1 LIMIT 1
